blocks.html: Do you know what you want? What you really really want? And if so, have you got a clear vision of your intentions, your dreams and goals? Or is life just happening to you and you’re being pushed this way and that without your own goals? Take a day off and create your future.
You can book in now for Saturday the 23rd of March, held in Greenhithe. Workshop will run from 10 am until around 4 pm.

The workshop will be a lovely, relaxing and inspiring day and you will get in touch with what it is that is truly important to you, your deepest dreams and goals. You’ll be working on your goals, create intentions and will get clear about them in a visual display. This way it’s not just in your head, the board will be a daily visual reminder and through the law of attraction will come true. You will leave with a newly found sense of direction and knowing.

I will talk you through a meditation to get in touch with your subconscious mind and get in tune with what you’re visualising for yourself for the near future. There’ll be time to reflect, to write your intentions down, to work out how you will feel once your intentions are coming through and finally plenty of time for going through magazines, cut out what rings true for you and get onto creating your own amazing Vision board.
Fruit, lovely snacks, various drinks will be available during the day, but please bring or organise your own lunch.

For bookings message or email me now and I’ll get payment details through to you to secure your place. Early bird price until 8th of March $77, after that the price will be $99. Please contact me for bookings.
Places are limited!
